prompt: What is the capital of France?

Summarize the following paragraph in 2 bullet points:\n\nRocketRide is an open-source AI pipeline engine with a high-performance C++ core and a VS Code-native visual builder. Pipelines are defined as portable .pipe JSON files, executed by a multithreaded runtime, and can integrate LLM providers, vector databases, OCR, and agent orchestration. It supports building, debugging, and scaling AI workflows directly from an IDE.
